hero.title: Students. Fast. Flexible. Competent.
hero.subtitle: Your reliable solution for moving, crafts and garden work

step1.title: Complete online form
step1.description: Enter your requirements and select date and time

step2.title: Receive staff contact details
step2.description: We'll send you details of your qualified helpers

step3.title: Workers arrive on time
step3.description: Our students will be there at the scheduled time

q1.question: How quickly can I book helpers?
q1.answer: You can often get helpers as early as the next day. For urgent requests, please contact us by phone.

q2.question: Are the students insured?
q2.answer: Yes, all our helpers are fully insured during the assignment.

q3.question: What happens if a helper gets sick?
q3.answer: We will provide a replacement so your appointment can take place as planned.

q4.question: Can I cancel my booking?
q4.answer: Yes, you can cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before the appointment.
